top_signals.title: LBMA Says Gold's Status as a Safe Haven Still Holds
top_signals.summary: London Bullion Market Association CEO Ruth Crowell thinks the narrative of gold's status as a safe haven still holds. She adds that it's important to measure safe haven status in years rather than weeks or months. She speaks with Paul Allen on "Insight with Haslinda Amin." (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Sweden demolishes Tunisia 5-1 to seize control of World Cup group
top_signals.summary: Earlier in Group F, Japan scored late to draw 2-2 against the Netherlands.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
